title: Orange Town Under Buggy’s Shadow
description: On pages 4–7, the Orange Town conflict focuses on Unknown person #1, Luffy, Buggy, Unknown person #2, with Buggy’s occupation testing Luffy, Zoro, Nami, and the townspeople.
scene: This part follows the pressure inside Orange Town as Buggy’s crew, the Straw Hats, and the people caught between them react to the escalating fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WHAT'S GOING ON...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: FWIP!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THE HAND... IT'S FLOATING!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: The chop- chop fruit...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's the devil fruit that I ate!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You can slice and dice me, but you can't kill me!!! I'm a chop- chop man!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: His body is back to- Gether again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I thought the stories about the devil fruit were just myths!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Chop- chop man!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That guy's a freak!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: GUM- GUM MAN

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: RORDONOA ZOLO! You NEVER HAD A CHANCE!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Looks like I missed your vitals... but you still took a serious wound!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I CAME TO SAVE LIFFY, NOW I'M THE ONE WHO NEEDS SAVING.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I HEARD THAT THIS CLOWN HAD EATED DEVIL-TREE FRUT... I SHOULD HAVE BEEN PREPARED...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Captain Buggy, you're the greatest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: FINISH HIM! FINISH HIM!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All five

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: NOT GOOD. THE TABLES HAVE TURNED...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: IF I DON'T DO SOMETHING, THOSE TWO WILL END UP DEAD--AND SO WILL I!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: STABBING A SOMEONE IN THE BACK... THAT'S FIGHTING DIRTY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You got that, BIG NOSE!??

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: YOU FOOL! THAT'S THE ONE THING YOU NEVER-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You dare to call me

summary: The scene keeps the Orange Town arc moving by tying the immediate battle to the town’s fear, Nami’s motives, and Luffy’s instinct to answer cruelty directly.
